trades.market: Will the Fed cut rates before 2027?
trades.risk_notes: Persistent inflation could delay Fed action
trades.grounding_source: CME FedWatch Tool indicating rate cut expectations

avoid.market: Will CPI rise more than 0.7% in April 2026?

notes: Current macro environment suggests inflationary pressures with potential Fed rate cuts in response to disinflationary signals by late 2026. GDP growth remains robust, reducing recession likelihood.
